scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('public')){throw new Error('Khong tim thay thu muc public o goc repository');} fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync('public','dist',{recursive:true}); console.log('Mina Clean build completed');"
scripts.verify: npm run preflight && npm run build
